objective.claimRule: Record a reduction only when the same measure has before and after evidence. Otherwise record it as unmeasured.

priority: replace repeated decisions with machine-readable routing
replace repeated edits with one generated source
shorten overlapping skill and markdown instructions

versioning.minor: new reusable optimization mechanism or metric

comparisonRequirements: token counts are exposed by the execution environment
baseline and current work have the same workflow type
target count and implementation scope are comparable
both measurements use the same token accounting method
developmentTokenTracking.claimRule: Set overallReduction only from comparable measured token totals. Keep it null for proxy-only or unavailable records.

backlog.problem: Automation guidance can be repeated across root and Toolbox instructions.
backlog.proposedChange: When either file is next changed for automation policy, keep only routing there and move detailed policy to the indexed source.

evidence.unit: characters in the duplicated automation sections of AGENTS.md and toolbox/AGENTS.md

backlog.problem: Result records repeat a large structure and can require manual edits.
backlog.proposedChange: Route unchecked and checked records into separate folders and use one helper to validate, migrate, and apply confirmations without manual JSON edits.

evidence.unit: manual confirmation field and file-state edits per confirmed run
result files read during startup for the current repository state

backlog.problem: Generated module registries omitted two required boolean capabilities and required repeated manual corrections.
backlog.proposedChange: Generate explicit resultCode and png defaults in every new module registry.

evidence.unit: manual capability field additions per five-tool create run

backlog.problem: 크리에이트 실행마다 다섯 도구의 index.html과 tool.js를 반복해서 수작업으로 만들어야 함
backlog.proposedChange: 설정의 runtimePreset과 ui.fields에서 공통 실행 셸과 도구 연결 모듈을 생성함

evidence.unit: manually created embed shell and entry files per five-tool create run

backlog.problem: 한 크리에이트 설정을 완성하려면 생성·빌드·색인·검증 명령을 여섯 번 따로 호출해야 함
backlog.proposedChange: 설정 경로 하나로 여섯 단계를 순서대로 실행하고 실패 즉시 중단하는 실행기를 제공함

evidence.unit: automation command invocations per five-tool create config
